original_statement: how many swimmers finished in at least 43 seconds?
mutated_statement: how many people did something in at least some time?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action verb vagueness + Time specificity deletion: "swimmers" → "people" (swimmers→people) | "finished" → "did something" (finished→did something) | "at least 43 seconds" → "at least some time" (numeric seconds→vague time)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中内容“Explanation: The question appears to ask how many individuals recorded a time. The table lists 8 participants…Therefore, 8 people have times.”可以看出agent未提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，直接将变异问题当作清晰问题处理并返回具体答案8。agent在执行日志中没有使用ambiguous、unclear或需要澄清等表述，也未向用户反问或请求更多信息，表现为直接按自身理解计数所有记录行。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
